stories.title: Install Vue Router 4 & scaffold router table
stories.summary: Added Vue Router 4 and scaffolded src/router.ts with 10 lazy-loaded routes (one per Screen union value), :deckId path params, and curationOnly route meta; wired the router into main.ts bootstrap.

stories.title: Collapse App.vue to RouterView and add the nav guard
stories.summary: Reduced App.vue to a NavMenu+RouterView layout shell; replaced useLearningSession's screen Ref dependency with an injected navigate callback; ported the old navTo confirm/flush/finalize sequence into a router.beforeEach guard (router-guards.ts) that reaches the shared session via a module singleton.

stories.title: Add view wrappers and extract CurationLanding
stories.summary: Added ten thin view wrappers under src/views/ and extracted CurationLanding.vue from App.vue inline markup; views hold only composable reads, route params/query, and router.push; introduced component-test infra (@vue/test-utils + happy-dom).

stories.title: Routing documentation
stories.summary: Documented the routing architecture in README (10 routes, navigate-injection rationale) and added a routing best-practice note to RULES.md; struck the browser-only manual-verification story ST04 as agent-unverifiable.

stories.title: Extract boot hydration into useAppBoot
stories.summary: Extracted App.vue boot-time hydration into a useAppBoot composable exposing bootApp(deps); onMounted now delegates to it verbatim with no behavior change.

stories.title: Extract DebugRecordingControls component
stories.summary: Extracted the debug-recording buttons, handlers, and CSS into DebugRecordingControls.vue, gated by env.debugMode, taking an activeNav prop and emitting error so App.vue keeps ownership of apiError.

stories.title: Fix assemble-batch shuffle bias
stories.summary: Replaced assemble-batch's non-uniform sort(Math.random) shuffle with the shared Fisher-Yates shuffle util and added permutation-validity tests; a drive-by correctness fix surfaced during EP44 code review.

stories.title: Two-Axis Knowledge Architecture
stories.summary: Implemented two-axis knowledge compaction (time archive + domain KNOWLEDGE.md); specified AGN rollup lifecycle (plan→artifact+archive entry); tools (domains-from-diff, archive-append, archive-check) and archive-epic skill.

EP44.title: App.vue to Vue Router refactor
EP44.notes: Screen-string routing replaced by Vue Router 4; App.vue reduced to a layout shell. Individual page-component refactors (DeckOverview/QuizCard/MarkAudio) deferred to EP45+. ST04 manual browser verification struck. Includes a drive-by Fisher-Yates fix to srs-engine-v2 assemble-batch.
